title: Hierarchical assignment to inout port handled incorrectly

features.name: inout wire logic port declaration
features.description: Code should include a module with an inout port declared as inout wire logic

features.name: hierarchical assignment to inout port
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical assignment to an inout port from a parent module referencing a child module instance by name

features.name: inout port read in initial block
features.description: Code should include an inout port being read inside an initial procedural block in the owning module
